title: Improved Enderdragon model
description: Change the appearance of the Enderdragon to look a little more like a dragon, while keeping its Minecraftiness.
body:
### [THIS RESOURCE PACK REQUIRES OPTIFINE TO WORK]
or any mod that enables Custom Entity Models, like Entity Model Features [EMF] by traben_0.

Dragon model is made by me using Blockbench and its CEM template loader.
